# NotificationStreamPlacement enumeration

Which stream a notification kind belongs on (spec §10.6).

```csharp
public enum NotificationStreamPlacement
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Subscription | `0` | One of the four change kinds — belongs on a subscription stream. |
| RequestScoped | `1` | A progress/logging kind — belongs on a request's own response stream. |
| Neither | `2` | Neither a change kind nor a request-scoped kind. |
